scripts.dev: docker compose up -d postgres redis minio && concurrently --names proxy,backend --prefix-colors green,blue "cd frontend && portless run pnpm dev" "cd backend && uv run uvicorn api.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload"
scripts.dev:services: docker compose up -d postgres redis minio
scripts.dev:frontend: cd frontend && portless run pnpm dev
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && uv run uvicorn api.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload
